E:\VS2022\Common7\IDE\CommonExtensions\Microsoft\CMake\CMake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\demo.dir/objects.a
E:\MSYS2\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\demo.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\demo.dir\objects1.rsp
E:\MSYS2\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g  -Wl,-rpath-link,D:/BaiduNetdiskDownload/项目2-26/project2/install/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/usr/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu -Wl,-rpath-link,/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\demo.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o demo.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libdemo.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\demo.dir\linkLibs.rsp
